calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Veenstra appeared by telephone for Nancy Chen (Trustee).

The Court stated that it appears the property was deeded out from the trust for refinancing and was not put back into the trust. Mr. Veenstra stated that the Court is right, that the trustors were not sophisticated people with legal matters and that when they did their estate planning, they thought they had everything in order. The Amended Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
